prompt_blocks.content: The request mutator walks sorted prompt regions, appends cache_control metadata at selected block boundaries, and preserves the original message content when no breakpoint is requested.
The tests assert that the mutator places two cache_control markers for stable and semi-stable regions while leaving unrelated tool result payloads byte-identical.
